name: Effet Doppler
description: Calculez la fréquence observée due au mouvement relatif.
seo_description: Calculez la fréquence observée due au mouvement relatif. Calculateur gratuit, précis et instantané. Entrez vos valeurs pour des resultats precis.
example_label: Calculezte observed frequency when source moves at m/s toward observer moving at m/s.
result_context: The observed frequency {f_obs} Hz changes due to relative motion between source and observer.
steps: Source frequency f₀ = 500 Hz, v_sound = m/s
Source velocity vₛ = m/s (toward observer, positive)
Observer velocity vₒ = m/s (toward source, positive)
mistakes: Using wrong sign convention for velocities
Confusing source and observer velocity positions in formule
Not accounting for direction of motion (toward vs away)
